description: As the Regional IT Director preparing for a new satellite medical facility, set up the location hierarchy in Snipe-IT and assign staged equipment. Create a parent location named 'West Campus Medical Center' (Address: 4500 Oak Park Boulevard, City: Portland, State: OR, Zip: 97201, Country: US, Manager: Sarah Chen (schen)) with three child locations: 'WC - Emergency Department', 'WC - Radiology Wing', and 'WC - Administrative Offices'. Update the Default Location for assets ASSET-WC01 and ASSET-WC04 to 'WC - Emergency Department', ASSET-WC02 to 'WC - Radiology Wing', and ASSET-WC03 to 'WC - Administrative Offices'. Ensure no assets remain in the 'Staging Warehouse' when you are finished.
